item.title: Flying Pig Leaves Entire Village without Electricity
item.description: A remote-controlled drone carrying a whole pig became entangled in high-voltage power lines and left en entire Sichuan village without power. The post...

item.title: Man Denies Turning to Plastic Surgery to Achieve ‘Idol-Level Looks’ Despite Shocking Transformation
item.description: A South Korean man has gone viral after claiming to have achieved a shocking physical transformation solely with makeup and hairstyling tricks. The po...

item.title: Taiwanese High-School Requires Students to Scale Rock Climbing Wall to Receive Graduation Certificate
item.description: A high school in Taiwan's Changhua County has become famous for challenging students to scale a 5-storey-high wall to receive their graduation certifi...

item.title: New Controversial Contact Sport Has Players Slamming into Each Other Full Force
item.description: Run Nation Championship (RNC) is a controversial contact sport that has two people colliding head-on with the purpose of knocking each other down. The...

item.title: Moya, ‘the World’s First Biomimetic Robot’ Emulates Human Features Down to Body Temperature
item.description: Chinese tech startup DroidUp recently unveiled the world's first AI-powered biomimetic humanoid robot capable of emulating human characteristics. The ...
